particulars.description: All that freehold property known as 30 clayport gardens, alnwick, NE66 1EG and land adjoining 30 clayport gardens, alnwick, NE66 1BH registered with title absolute at hm land registry under title numbers ND138515 and ND144252 together with all rights, interest, guarantees, rents and warranties relating to the property.
